AboutPage.title: Our Mission
AboutPage.subtitle: We believe that small changes in our daily lives can create a massive impact on our planet.
AboutPage.content1: EcoBox was born from the frustration of seeing the amount of single-use plastic we generate in our homes without realizing it. Our mission is to make the transition to a more sustainable lifestyle easier.
AboutPage.content2: We work directly with local artisans and ethical brands to bring the best eco-friendly products to your door, ensuring every item in your box is useful, high-quality, and truly sustainable.
